title: Smoked Aubergine Toast
description: A delicious and smoky twist on the classic aubergine toast. Perfect for a quick snack or light lunch.
instructions: 2. Cut the smoked aubergine into 1-inch (2.5 cm) thick slices.
3. Place the aubergine slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
5. Roast in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until tender and lightly caramelized.
6. Meanwhile, toast the bread until lightly browned.
7. Spread a layer of feta cheese on each toasted bread slice.
8. Top with a slice of roasted aubergine and a sprinkle of chopped parsley.
9. Drizzle with lemon juice, if using.
